_meta.description: D6 fixtures for ms-agent-dotnet / a2ui-recovery (A2UI error recovery)
_meta._note: ms-agent-dotnet's RecoveryAgent (agent/RecoveryAgent.cs) is a raw-SSE MapPost endpoint, NOT a MapAGUI-mounted ChatClientAgent. It does NOT emit an outer generate_a2ui tool call and its narration text is hard-coded in C# (WriteNarrationAsync) — so the ONLY calls that reach aimock are the inner secondary render calls made by A2uiSecondaryToolCaller, whose tool name is `_design_a2ui_surface` (NOT render_a2ui like the Python slugs). RecoveryAgent forwards the FULL pill prompt verbatim as the inner call's user_content (ExtractLastUserText -> A2uiSecondaryToolCaller.GetDesignToolArgumentsAsync), re-sending the SAME content each attempt so aimock advances sequenceIndex (0 invalid -> 1 valid) to drive the heal retry. NO `context` match field: the recovery pills' prompts are GLOBALLY unique across every slug, so userMessage alone disambiguates (mirrors the langgraph-python reference; a real browser does not send x-aimock-context). Validation (RecoveryAgent.ValidateComponents): a surface is INVALID when a component's static `child`/`children` string references an id that is not defined (dangling_child_reference) or when no `root` component exists; it is VALID when a `root` exists and every static child reference resolves. HEAL: attempt 1 (seq 0) invalid (root -> missing child) -> retry -> attempt 2 (seq 1) valid (Column + two Metric tiles) -> paints declarative-metric x2. EXHAUST: invalid on every attempt (no valid seq) -> recovery exhausts -> a2ui_recovery_exhausted `failed` card.

fixtures._comment: HEAL pill - inner _design_a2ui_surface attempt 1 (sequenceIndex 0): structurally INVALID (root's children reference a missing child id) -> RecoveryAgent.ValidateComponents returns dangling_child_reference and the validate->retry loop rejects it and retries.

match.userMessage: Generate the Vantage .NET quarterly revenue board and self-heal a malformed first render.

fixtures._comment: HEAL pill - inner _design_a2ui_surface attempt 2 (sequenceIndex 1): VALID surface (root Column + two Metric tiles, all child ids defined) -> validation passes -> recovery succeeds and paints (declarative-metric x2).

match.userMessage: Generate the Vantage .NET quarterly revenue board and self-heal a malformed first render.

fixtures._comment: EXHAUST pill - inner _design_a2ui_surface: structurally INVALID on every attempt (root references an id that is never defined) -> validation fails on all MaxAttempts (3) -> recovery exhausts to the a2ui_recovery_exhausted `failed` card. No sequenceIndex so it matches every attempt of this prompt.

match.userMessage: Generate a .NET board that fails every validation pass so I can preview the recovery fallback.
